kernel: gemm_8x8x8 (triple-nested loop int32 matmul, single AIE2P tile)
toolchain: IRON (mlir-aie) + Peano (LLVM-AIE) — open-source, no Chess, Apache 2.0
conclusion: First GEMM kernel compiled and executed through the complete open-source stack (IRON → Peano → AIE2P ELF → NPU). 8x8x8 int32 matmul on 1 AIE2P tile at ~254 µs. Chess reference: 30.1 TFLOPS on 32 tiles (3072x4096x1536). Gap is engineering effort, not magic.
